title: Bedrock Cauldrons
description: Potion and dye support for Cauldrons! Serverside through polymer. Requires a resource-pack
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated on modrinth!
# See https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrock-cauldrons-fabric for the latest version!


This mod adds dye and potion cauldrons!

You can dye leather armor from cauldrons with dye and mix colors.

Potion Cauldrons allow you to make tipped arrows (without requiring dragons breath for lingering potions!)

The mod comes with a resourcepack which is hosted through polymer, [checkout polymer's autohost docs](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/) for more info.
